title: Identify Unrecognized Atrial Fibrillation
summary: Identify atrial fibrillation documented in ECG or note text when the problem list does not reflect it.
problem_statement: Atrial fibrillation can appear in study reports or notes without being reflected in the active problem list or follow-up plan.

inputs.name: report_text
inputs.description: Text that may mention atrial fibrillation.

inputs.name: completion_state
inputs.description: Whether evaluation or anticoagulation review has already happened.

rule_sets.summary: If AF appears in reports without problem-list closure, flag for cardiology review.

examples: This ECG mentions new atrial fibrillation but it is not on the problem list.
